name: workspace-maps
description: Workspace-scoped Google Maps and Mapbox geocoding, routing, and map-card MCP tools.

interface.shortDescription: Geocode, route, matrix, and create map cards.
interface.longDescription: Adds workspace-scoped Google Maps and Mapbox MCP tools for geocoding, reverse geocoding, routes, distance matrices, and provider-neutral open-web map-card output.
defaultPrompt: Geocode these addresses and show a map card.
Find a route and create a map card.
